def1: noun. A projectile consisting of a shaft, a point and a tail with stabilizing fins that is shot from a bow.；noun. A sign or symbol used to indicate a direction (e.g. →).；verb. To move swiftly and directly (like an arrow)；verb. To let fly swiftly and directly
def2: n. (uncountable) unhappiness, woe；n. (countable) (usually in plural) An instance or cause of unhappiness.

def1: noun. The crime of deliberately starting a fire with intent to cause damage.；verb. To illegally set fire to; to burn down in a criminal manner
def2: noun. A cause:；noun. Rational thinking (or the capacity for it); the cognitive faculties, collectively, of conception, judgment, deduction and intuition.；verb. To deduce or come to a conclusion by being rational；verb. To perform a process of deduction or of induction, in order to convince or to confute; to argue.

def1: noun. The conscious production or arrangement of sounds, colours, forms, movements, or other elements in a manner that affects the senses and emotions, usually specifically the production of the beautiful in a graphic or plastic medium.；noun. The creative and emotional expression of mental imagery, such as visual, auditory, social, etc.
def2: noun. The conscious production or arrangement of sounds, colours, forms, movements, or other elements in a manner that affects the senses and emotions, usually specifically the production of the beautiful in a graphic or plastic medium.；noun. The creative and emotional expression of mental imagery, such as visual, auditory, social, etc.

def1: noun. The solid remains of a fire.；noun. The nonaqueous remains of a material subjected to any complete oxidation process.；verb. To reduce to a residue of ash. See ashing.；verb. To hit the end off of a burning cigar or cigarette.
def2: noun. Money in the form of notes/bills and coins, as opposed to cheques/checks or electronic transactions.；noun. Liquid assets, money that can be traded quickly, as distinct from assets that are invested and cannot be easily exchanged.；verb. To exchange (a check/cheque) for money in the form of notes/bills.；verb. To obtain a payout from a tournament.；adjective. Great; excellent; cool.

def1: noun. An incidental remark made quietly so as to be heard by the person to whom it is said and not by any others in the vicinity.；noun. A brief comment by a character addressing the audience, unheard by other characters.；adverb. To or on one side so as to be out of the way.
def2: adverb. Otherwise; else.；preposition. Next to; at the side of.；preposition. Not relevant to.

def1: noun. An act or instance of asking.；noun. Something asked or asked for.；verb. To request (information, or an answer to a question).；verb. To put forward (a question) to be answered.
def2: noun. An act or instance of asking.；noun. Something asked or asked for.；verb. To request (information, or an answer to a question).；verb. To put forward (a question) to be answered.

def1: noun. Something or someone of any value; any portion of one's property or effects so considered.；noun. Any component, model, process or framework of value that can be leveraged or reused.
def2: noun. Something or someone of any value; any portion of one's property or effects so considered.；noun. Any component, model, process or framework of value that can be leveraged or reused.；noun. Any property or object of value that one possesses, usually considered as applicable to the payment of one's debts.；noun. The left side of a balance sheet.

def1: verb. To reply to or talk to someone, either online or face-to-face. (from the practice of targeting a message or reply to someone online by writing @name)；noun. The at sign (@).；preposition. In, near, or in the general vicinity of a particular place.；preposition. (indicating time) Indicating occurrence in an instant of time or a period of time relatively short in context or from the speaker's perspective.
def2: verb. To reply to or talk to someone, either online or face-to-face. (from the practice of targeting a message or reply to someone online by writing @name)；noun. The at sign (@).；preposition. In, near, or in the general vicinity of a particular place.；preposition. (indicating time) Indicating occurrence in an instant of time or a period of time relatively short in context or from the speaker's perspective.

def1: noun. A bound collection of maps often including tables, illustrations or other text.；noun. A bound collection of tables, illustrations etc. on any given subject.
def2: noun. A bound collection of maps often including tables, illustrations or other text.；noun. A bound collection of tables, illustrations etc. on any given subject.

def1: noun. The smallest possible amount of matter which still retains its identity as a chemical element, now known to consist of a nucleus surrounded by electrons.；noun. (history of science) A hypothetical particle posited by Greek philosophers as an ultimate and indivisible component of matter.
def2: noun. The smallest possible amount of matter which still retains its identity as a chemical element, now known to consist of a nucleus surrounded by electrons.；noun. (history of science) A hypothetical particle posited by Greek philosophers as an ultimate and indivisible component of matter.

def1: adverb. On, to, or at the top.；preposition. On the top of.；preposition. On the top, with "of".
def2: noun. The highest or uppermost part of something.；noun. A child’s spinning toy; a spinning top.；verb. To cover on the top or with a top.；verb. To cut or remove the top (as of a tree)；adjective. Situated on the top of something.；adjective. Best; of the highest quality or rank.；adverb. Rated first.

def1: n. The space, often unfinished and with sloped walls, directly below the roof in the uppermost part of a house or other building, generally used for storage or habitation.；n. (slang) A person's head or brain.
def2: noun. The space, often unfinished and with sloped walls, directly below the roof in the uppermost part of a house or other building, generally used for storage or habitation.

def1: noun. A judicial examination.；noun. An examination in general.；verb. To examine and adjust (e.g. an account).；verb. To conduct an independent review and examination of system records and activities in order to test the adequacy and effectiveness of data security and data integrity procedures, to ensure compliance with established policy and operational procedures, and to recommend any necessary changes
def2: noun. A judicial examination.；noun. An examination in general.；verb. To examine and adjust (e.g. an account).；verb. To conduct an independent review and examination of system records and activities in order to test the adequacy and effectiveness of data security and data integrity procedures, to ensure compliance with established policy and operational procedures, and to recommend any necessary changes

def1: noun. The sister or sister-in-law of one’s parent.；noun. The female cousin of one’s parent.
def2: noun. The sister or sister-in-law of one’s parent.；noun. The female cousin of one’s parent.

def1: verb. To try not to meet or communicate with (a person); to shun；verb. To keep away from; to keep clear of; to stay away from
def2: verb. To try not to meet or communicate with (a person); to shun；verb. To keep away from; to keep clear of; to stay away from

def1: noun. A waiting for; ambush.；noun. Watching, watchfulness, suspicious observation.；verb. To wait for.；verb. To expect.
def2: noun. A delay.；noun. An ambush.；verb. To delay movement or action until the arrival or occurrence of; to await. (Now generally superseded by “wait for”.)；verb. To delay movement or action until some event or time; to remain neglected or in readiness.

def1: adjective. Vigilant or on one's guard against danger or difficulty.；adjective. Conscious or having knowledge of something.
def2: adjective. Vigilant or on one's guard against danger or difficulty.；adjective. Conscious or having knowledge of something.

def1: adjective. Very bad.；adjective. Exceedingly great; usually applied intensively.；adverb. Awfully; dreadfully; terribly.；adverb. Very, extremely.
def2: adjective. Very bad.；adjective. Exceedingly great; usually applied intensively.；adverb. Awfully; dreadfully; terribly.；adverb. Very, extremely.

def1: noun. A pointed instrument for piercing small holes, as in leather or wood; used by shoemakers, saddlers, cabinetmakers, etc. The blade is differently shaped and pointed for different uses, as in the brad awl, saddler's awl, shoemaker's awl, etc.；noun. Any of various hesperiid butterflies.
def2: adv. (intensifier, sometimes childish) Wholly; entirely; completely; totally.；adv. Apiece; each.

def1: noun. A tool for felling trees or chopping wood etc. consisting of a heavy head flattened to a blade on one side, and a handle attached to it.；noun. An ancient weapon consisting of a head that has one or two blades and a long handle.；verb. To fell or chop with an axe.；verb. To lay off, terminate or drastically reduce, especially in a rough or ruthless manner; to cancel.
def2: noun. An imaginary line around which an object spins (an axis of rotation) or is symmetrically arranged (an axis of symmetry).；noun. A fixed one-dimensional figure, such as a line or arc, with an origin and orientation and such that its points are in one-to-one correspondence with a set of numbers; an axis forms part of the basis of a space or is used to position and locate data in a graph (a coordinate axis)

def1: noun. A seemingly self-evident or necessary truth which is based on assumption; a principle or proposition which cannot actually be proved or disproved.；noun. (proof theory) A fundamental assumption that serves as a basis for deduction of theorems; a postulate (sometimes distinguished from postulates as being universally applicable, whereas postulates are particular to a certain science or context).
def2: noun. An imaginary line around which an object spins (an axis of rotation) or is symmetrically arranged (an axis of symmetry).；noun. A fixed one-dimensional figure, such as a line or arc, with an origin and orientation and such that its points are in one-to-one correspondence with a set of numbers; an axis forms part of the basis of a space or is used to position and locate data in a graph (a coordinate axis)
